In Chart No. 86 the fourth house is Virgo and it is
occupied by the 3rd lord Sun and aspected by Saturn lord of
the 8th. The fourth lord Mercury is equally afflicted. The
native enjoyed for some time the luxury of owning a car but
he had to dispense not only with his car but a fine job also
as his spendthrift nature and speculative tendencies landed
him in endless troubles and he was pursued day

Balance of Rahu Dasa at birth : Years 16-1-18.
